Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Enforcer techniques]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Enforcer techniques provide full-body enhancement.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Enforcer techniques consist of five basic categories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Enforcer attack techniques are individual attacks that enhance the effect of a single motion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Enforcer attack techniques carry more power than full-body techniques but can be clumsier and leave the user open for counterattack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 17''' — Altavian Arelius specializes in Enforcer techniques.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Pride was cycling two different Enforcer techniques at once.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon's body handled the strain of Enforcer techniques unscathed.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long practices weapon Enforcer techniques.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
